stemHtml: Why are large aeroplane required to be equipped with a fuel jettisoning system?

options.a: An overweight aircraft may damage the runway if the PCN, pavement classification number, is lower than the ACN, aircraft classification number.
options.b: To reduce aircraft mass after take-off in order to comply with the climb gradients required under CS 25.
options.c: To reduce the mass to Maximum Landing Mass.
options.d: It will reduce the risk of fire on landing.
